title: Introducing ComicsGen — AI-Powered Comic Creation for Everyone
body:
ComicsGen is an AI-powered comic creation app I recently started developing to help anyone bring their characters and stories to life through comic strips using AI.

It all began over 6 months ago with my daily comic strip, Sisters of Summerville, starring my Yorkie Honey Bear and tuxedo cat Bootsie Belle. That creative journey sparked a bigger idea… what if anyone could create their own comic strip with no art skills or expensive software required?

ComicsGen is being built as an easy-to-use AI comic studio where users can design characters, write stories, create storyboards, choose styles and layouts, add dialogue, and export finished comics ready to share.

Powered by advanced AI tools including FLUX.1 image generation and Llama 3.3 storytelling.
